full_text:
Nie You (Wenti) 聶友 (文悌)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Nie You (聶友), styledWenti (文悌), was born in Yuzhang. Urged his friend Zhuge Ke to not attack Wei but was ignored. Nie You was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Nie You lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
